description: Represents an error response from the API
name: Error

correlationId.description: A unique identifier for the request, useful for debugging

message.description: A human-readable message describing the error

subCategory.description: A more specific category for the error

links.description: Links to documentation or remediation steps

errors.description: A list of specific error details

items.description: Detailed information about a specific error

message.description: A human-readable message describing the specific error

code.description: An error code for this specific error

in.description: The field or parameter where the error occurred

subCategory.description: A specific subcategory for this error
